title: Maintenance of housing developments
doc_html:
§438.  Maintenance of housing developments

A local housing authority may maintain, repair, and replace all housing developments, any portions thereof and any facilities and improvements contained therein or associated therewith.

Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
